title: OpenAI Added Codex Mobile Worktree, Goal, And Review Controls
summary: OpenAI's Codex changelog for ChatGPT iOS 1.2026.153 records Codex Mobile support for branch/worktree setup, environment setup scripts, goal management, inline review comments, side chat from transcript selection, prompt editing, and usage/token activity views.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Update mobile Codex runbooks and QA checklists for branch/worktree creation, environment setup scripts, goal workflows, and inline review comments.

estimated_cost_effect.basis: official changelog records usage and token activity visibility, not a pricing or token-accounting rule change

impacts.recommended_action: Use the added usage and token activity views as an observability aid, but do not treat this as a provider pricing or token-accounting change.

detail.change_summary: ChatGPT iOS 1.2026.153 expanded Codex Mobile workflow controls for repository setup, goals, reviews, prompt editing, side chat, and usage visibility.

limitations: APW records a mobile-app workflow change, not a canonical API pricing, quota, or token-accounting change.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
